dev_focus: ⚠️ C2600 FRESH DIRECTIVE — DO NOT READ GIT HISTORY AS CONTEXT. ⚠️ TASK: CREATE src/components/shop/referral-card.tsx (THIS FILE DOES NOT EXIST YET). (6) Design: Gift icon (lucide-react), rose/pink card (rose-50 bg, rose-200 border), similar visual weight to CreateAccountCard. (7) In page.tsx insert `<ReferralCard orderNumber={order.orderNumber} />` AFTER line 278 (after </CreateAccountCard>). NO DB changes. Run npm run build — must pass.

schema.pause: Map of agent_name to condition (paused or until_next_bolt_commit)
schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name to run_every integer
